tags.description: The Epigraphical museum exhibits 13536 inscriptions and is the biggest of its kind in the world. It displays collections of inscriptions from different historic periods of Greece, as well as some Latin and Jewish inscriptions.
tags.name: Επιγραφικό μουσείο

tags.description:en: The Art Collection of National Bank of Greece Museum includes about 1300 artworks made by great painters and sculptors of the 19th and 20th century.

tags.description: The Numismatic Museum owns 500.000 acquisitions –mostly coins as well as medals, lead bullae, gems, weights, obeloi and talents- dated from the 14th century BC until today

tags.description: This is a costume museum, which includes collections of some 25,000 items, mainly authentic regional costumes and jewelery of historical Greek area .The purpose of existence is to collect, preserve and finally the promotion of the history of Greek costume
tags.is_closed: Good Friday, Holy Saturday, Holy Spirit Day, Shrove Monday

tags.description: Contains plans of the city from 1842, paintings, sculptures, old books and memorabilia.

tags.description: The Museum enables visitors to learn about the evolution of the car through it's history.

tags.description: Est. in 1975 in honor of all those who fought for the freedom of the country. Among the activities are the versions, the establishment, maintenance of monuments, heroes, memory space and strengthening institutions in region. Ticket:3 €
tags.name: Πολεμικό Μουσείο

tags.description: Includes a collection of over 8000 samples of ceramic, glass, metalwork, jewelery, woodwork, etc. It also promotes the development of Islamic art in the 19th century.

tags.description: Αντικείμενό του, η ιστορία του νεότερου Ελληνισμού: η περίοδος της τουρκοκρατίας και φραγκοκρατίας, η επανάσταση του 1821, οι απελευθερωτικοί αγώνες, η δημιουργία του ανεξάρτητου κράτους, η πολιτική, κοινωνική και πνευματική εξέλιξη του Ελληνισμού.
tags.name: Εθνικό Ιστορικό Μουσείο

tags.description: The National Archaeological Museum of Athens is the largest archaeological museum in Greece and one of the most important museums in the world devoted to ancient Greek art.
